message:
feat: ft session CLI subcommands — list, show, delete, doctor (wa-2l27x.6)

Adds `ft session list|show|delete|doctor` CLI subcommands for session
persistence management. Core query functions (list_sessions, show_session,
session_doctor, delete_session) implemented in session_restore.rs with
27 passing tests. JSON output supported via --format json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
